title: Plugin Extension Types
description: Schema for how plugins extend the OrqaStudio core type system. Defines provides.schemas, provides.relationships, and validation rules for plugin manifests.

PluginArtifactSchema.title: PluginArtifactSchema
PluginArtifactSchema.description: An artifact type schema contributed by a plugin. Plugin schemas must declare key, label, icon, idPrefix, and frontmatter. They may use $ref to reference core types in core.json.

key.description: Unique artifact type key (lowercase, hyphenated). MUST NOT collide with core artifact type keys.

plural.description: Plural display label. Defaults to label + 's' if omitted.

defaultPath.description: Default relative path within .orqa/ for storing artifacts of this type.

idPrefix.description: ID prefix for auto-generated IDs (e.g. 'EPIC', 'TASK'). MUST NOT collide with core ID prefixes.

frontmatter.description: Frontmatter field declarations for this artifact type.

required.description: Fields that must be present in every artifact of this type.

optional.description: Fields that may optionally appear in artifacts of this type.

statusTransitions.description: Status transition rules specific to this artifact type.

PluginRelationshipExtension.title: PluginRelationshipExtension
PluginRelationshipExtension.description: A relationship type contributed by a plugin. Relationships MUST include key, inverse, from, to, and semantic to integrate correctly with the validation engine.

key.description: Relationship type key (lowercase, hyphenated). MUST NOT collide with core relationship keys.

inverse.description: Inverse relationship key. May be the same as key for symmetric relationships.

label.description: Human-readable label for the forward direction.

inverseLabel.description: Human-readable label for the inverse direction.

from.description: Artifact type keys that are valid sources for this relationship.

to.description: Artifact type keys that are valid targets for this relationship.

description.description: Human-readable explanation of what this relationship means.

semantic.description: The semantic category this relationship belongs to. Determines how the validation engine treats it.

constraints.description: Optional validation constraints for this relationship.

required.description: Whether artifacts of the 'from' types must have at least one of this relationship.

minCount.description: Minimum number of this relationship required.

maxCount.description: Maximum number of this relationship allowed.

requireInverse.description: Whether the inverse edge must also be present.

PluginManifestProvides.title: PluginManifestProvides
PluginManifestProvides.description: The 'provides' block of a plugin manifest. Declares all capabilities the plugin registers with the app at install time.

schemas.description: Artifact type schemas this plugin introduces. Each schema extends the core type system.

relationships.description: Relationship types this plugin introduces. Each relationship extends the core relationship vocabulary.

knowledge.description: Knowledge artifact paths contributed by this plugin.

agents.description: Agent artifact paths contributed by this plugin.

views.description: Custom view registrations contributed by this plugin.

widgets.description: Dashboard widget registrations contributed by this plugin.

hooks.description: Hook registrations contributed by this plugin.

PluginManifest.title: PluginManifest
PluginManifest.description: The full orqa-plugin.json manifest for an OrqaStudio plugin.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor autocompletion.

displayName.description: Human-readable name shown in the plugin manager UI.

description.description: Short description of what the plugin does.

requires.description: Plugin dependencies — names of plugins that must be loaded first.

compatibility.description: Minimum versions required for this plugin to function.

PluginInstallValidationResult.title: PluginInstallValidationResult
PluginInstallValidationResult.description: Result of validating a plugin manifest at install time.

valid.description: Whether the plugin manifest passed all validation checks.

errors.description: Blocking validation errors that must be resolved before installation.

warnings.description: Non-blocking warnings about the plugin manifest.

key_collisions.description: Schema or relationship keys that conflict with existing definitions.
